_readme: v7 + 소급 타이밍 전수 검증 확정
title: What's that got to do with it?
expression: What's that got to do with it?

sentences.en: Say, how would you like some breakfast? Would you like some breakfast?
sentences.ko: 저기, 아침 좀 먹을 텐가? 아침 어때?

sentences.en: ★ What's that got to do with it?
You can have pancakes any damn time of night you want.
sentences.ko: 팬케이크야 밤 아무 때고 먹고 싶을 때 먹는 거지.
